thinking.text:
The user has provided their date of birth (05/12/1991) and address (3421 Sakura Avenue, Portland, OR 97205). I need to verify their identity by looking up their information. However, I don't have their user ID, name, or email to look them up directly.

Let me think about what tools I have available:
- get_user_information_by_id - requires user_id
- get_user_information_by_name - requires customer_name (case sensitive)
- get_user_information_by_email - requires email

The user hasn't provided their name, user ID, or email. I only have their date of birth and address. I cannot look them up with just these two pieces of information using the available tools.

I should ask the user for either their name, user ID, or email so I can look up their account and verify their identity.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
Thank you for providing that information! To look up your account and verify your identity, I'll also need one more piece of information. Could you please provide either:

- Your **full name**, or
- Your **user ID**, or
- Your **email address**

This will allow me to locate your account in our system.
